findings.description: The index title for section s1 is "Nablarchアプリケーション処理方式の概要" but the section content covers two distinct H2 topics from the source: "NAFの構成" and "Nablarchアプリケーション処理方式" (including the H3 "Nablarchアプリケーション処理方式の概要"). The title only reflects the second topic, making the index misleading about the section's actual scope.
findings.source_evidence: Source H2: "NAFの構成" and H2: "Nablarchアプリケーション処理方式" are both merged into s1, but the index title only names the latter.

findings.description: The hint "ファイル転送処理方式" is missing from s1 hints, despite appearing as No.6 in the 入力処理方式 table within s1's content.
findings.source_evidence: Source table row No.6: 入力インターフェース=ファイル, 入力処理方式名称=ファイル転送処理方式
